prompt: How to read from stdin in ARO?
actual: The session is ending. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!
model_raw:
<think>

The session is ending. If you need any further assistance, feel free to ask!
expected:
Pipe source through `aro` and the engine reads it as a program; for runtime stdin, use the stdin system object.

```aro
(ReadStdin: Example) {
    Read the <line> from the <stdin>.
    Log <line> to the <console>.
    Return an <OK: status> with <line>.
}
```
